app.command: cd packages/app && BROWSER=none EXPO_PUBLIC_LOCAL_DAEMON="localhost:${PASEO_SERVICE_DAEMON_PORT}" npx expo start --port $PASEO_PORT

desktop.command: npm run build:main --workspace=@getpaseo/desktop && PASEO_CORS_ORIGINS="*" EXPO_PUBLIC_LOCAL_DAEMON="localhost:${PASEO_SERVICE_DAEMON_PORT}" PASEO_WEB_PLATFORM=electron npx concurrently --kill-others --names "metro,electron" --prefix-colors "magenta,cyan" "BROWSER=none npm run start:expo --workspace=@getpaseo/app -- --port $PASEO_PORT" "npx wait-on tcp:$PASEO_PORT && EXPO_DEV_URL=http://localhost:$PASEO_PORT electron packages/desktop"
